offer: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, inaccurate fixed asset depreciation calculations cause financial discrepancies. We provide automated depreciation reporting instead of manual spreadsheets for depreciation calculations.
problem: Inaccurate fixed asset depreciation calculations leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help

Share insights in forums for accounting tools

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users

automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
